title: Shared Memory, Mutexes, Atomics, the Memory Model, and Race Evidence · Stakeholder Go Mission
summary: A batch processing team. The team needs bounded parallel work, ordered result policy, failure cancellation, race-free metrics, leak evidence, and overload behavior. Planned artifact: Deliver Cancelable Concurrent Job Orchestrator with acceptance evidence, rubric defense, reflection, and a changed-constraint extension. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Build bounded fan-out and fan-in stages with one ownership model, ordered-result policy, error propagation, and leak checks.
Bound queues and concurrency, choose block, reject, shed, or degrade behavior, and measure saturation.
Detect leaked goroutines with ownership traces, cancellation tests, profiles, and changed failure cases.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
